title: wcr source.lock v0.1
description: Schema for the source.lock file inside a wcr bundle. Always present at every tier; embedding the source itself is policy. Format frozen at Phase 211.4 (M2 resolution): replaces per-file array with a single Merkle-root tree hash to keep bundle size constant regardless of crate file count.

source_uri.description: Canonical source-fetch URL. For crates.io packages: https://crates.io/api/v1/crates/<name>/<ver>/download. For git-pinned: the git URL + commit.

source_tree_hash.description: Merkle root over canonically-sorted (relpath, sha256(content)) entries, joined as sha256(relpath) || sha256(content) and concatenated in relpath-sorted order, then SHA-256'd. Algorithm tagged via tree_hash_algo.

tree_hash_algo.description: Tree-hash algorithm identifier. PoC frozen at 'merkle-v1'; future algos bump this tag.

embedded.description: Whether the source tree is shipped inside the bundle under source/. False for tier-3 proprietary mode (post-PoC); consumer fetches via source_uri + verifies Merkle root after fetching.

file_count.description: Number of source files counted in the Merkle tree (excludes target/, doc images, etc. per the source-discovery rules).

total_bytes.description: Sum of source file sizes in bytes.

files.description: (Opt-in via `wcr bundle --with-file-list`) Per-file listing for audit-grade replay. Omitted by default to keep source.lock size constant.

source_discovery.description: Rules used to decide which files participate in the Merkle tree. Documented for reproducibility.

include.description: Glob patterns rooted at package root.

exclude.description: Glob patterns excluded after include match (typically: target/, .git/, *.lock-free generated artifacts).
